title: galium parisiense var. anglicum
intro: Galium parisiense var. anglicum, also known as English bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits associated with Galium parisiense var. anglicum include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections, and acting as a natural diuretic to promote urine production. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
